description_long: This humanoid robot features a streamlined, matte teal body with a smooth, rounded torso and a distinct, oval-shaped head. The head is black-faced with two circular, glowing blue eye-like elements, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. Its arms are simple, elongated ovals attached at the shoulders, lacking visible joints or hands, and the robot has no visible legs, instead tapering to a point at the bottom of the torso. The surface of the robot is marked with subtle scratches and a triangular insignia on the chest, suggesting light wear and possible use in urban environments. The back of the head and torso are seamless, with no visible access panels or ports. The overall design is minimalist and futuristic, with a focus on smooth, continuous surfaces and a compact, non-threatening silhouette.
description: A sleek, teal humanoid robot with a rounded body, black oval face, glowing blue eyes, and simple oval arms, featuring a minimalist and futuristic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black faceplate with two blue eyes, triangular chest insignia, and both oval arms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth, rounded head and torso, with one arm visible and the head slightly separated from the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the seamless, unadorned back of the head and torso, with both arms visible from the side.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the black faceplate in profile, one blue eye, and the arm extending from the shoulder.
attribute_pose: The robot is in a neutral, upright standing pose with its head slightly elevated above the torso and both arms extended outward at its sides.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only integrated panels and a triangular insignia on the chest, with no decorative coverings.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a smooth black oval plate with two glowing blue circular eye elements and no visible mouth or nose, giving it a simple, expressive appearance.
attribute_limb_articulation: The arms are attached at the shoulders with no visible joints or hands, suggesting limited articulation and a rigid structure; no legs or feet are present.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Two possible optical sensors (eyes) are visible on the faceplate; no other sensors are apparent.
